10-K 1 acme_income_stmt.htm FORM 10-K Acme Corp Form 10-K

ACME CORPORATION

Annual Report on Form 10-K

For the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023

Item 1. Business

Acme Corp designs and sells industrial widgets across North America. Revenue grew on strong datacenter power demand during fiscal year 2023.

Item 7. Management Discussion and Analysis

Operating margins improved as productivity initiatives offset raw material inflation. Capital expenditures for the new facility totalled $42 million in fiscal 2023.

Item 8. Financial Statements

Consolidated Statements of Income

(In thousands, except per share data)

Line Item Year Ended Dec 31, 2023 Year Ended Dec 31, 2022
Net Revenue $245,800 $198,400
Cost of Goods Sold $152,300 $127,600
Gross Profit $93,500 $70,800
Operating Expenses $41,200 $36,500
Operating Income $52,300 $34,300
Net Income $38,400 $24,100
Earnings Per Share (Basic) $3.84 $2.41

Item 1A. Risk Factors

Acme faces supply chain risk and commodity price exposure from rising electricity costs and lithium carbonate sourcing constraints.
